title: centaurium pulchellum var. altaicum
intro: Centaurium pulchellum var. altaicum, also known as Altaic centaury, is a flowering plant species in the gentian family, native to Central Asia and Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant properties, making it a valuable remedy for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Altaic centaury include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and providing relief from colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements and capsules, showcasing its versatility in traditional and modern herbal medicine.
